title: minuartia tenuifolia subsp. vaillantiana
intro: Minuartia tenuifolia subsp. vaillantiana, also known as Vaillant's Alpine Willowherb or Vaillant's Rock-cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant's health benefits include relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing fever and soothing sore throats. Traditionally, Minuartia tenuifolia subsp. vaillantiana is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
